title: VayuDrishti baked wards.geojson
note: Real ward polygons (Datameet) with ward_id baked per spec 5.0. Consumers join on ward_id and never re-derive it. Coordinates rounded to 5 decimals and lightly simplified for payload/git size; visually loss-free at city zoom.

name.description: Human-readable ward name (XSS-untrusted; render as text only).

ward_code.description: Native source code (Delhi Ward_No, Mumbai letter, BBMP number).

population.description: WorldPop 100m (GEE, 2020 vintage) summed over the polygon; null until computed.
